THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED D B A GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED; ALTHOUGH DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO PLAINTIFF'S SEPERATE STATEMENT DOES NOT COMPLY WITH C R C 3.1350, DEFENDANT'S DECLARATION RAISES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO THE AMOUNT OWED. OPPOSING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT HAHN, ALEX K INDIVIDUALLY
